scenarios.test_name: Normal ingest and workspace query (proof_trace, edges, graph expansion)
scenarios.notes: Covers standard ingest→query, evidence fields, 1-hop edges in response.

scenarios.test_name: Same-session double ingest → collaboration / conflict merge edges
Cold-tier search merged into query (include_cold + ArchiveColdRecord mirror)
scenarios.notes: Ingest calls ArchiveColdRecord so cold store holds the same text; query uses include_cold so TieredDataPlane runs ColdSearch and proof_trace reports a tier label containing cold.

scenarios.test_name: Collaboration sharing — visibility=shared memory in workspace query
scenarios.notes: Exercises shared visibility + workspace-scoped retrieval (Member A collaboration sharing coverage).

scenarios.test_name: Graph expansion — two memories same workspace, expect multiple objects and edges
scenarios.notes: Two sessions in one workspace; query should return multiple mem_* IDs and non-empty edges/nodes for 1-hop expansion.
